sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Check what changed after clicking pink bar
seg = current_frame.segmentation
for n in seg['nodes']:
    if n['color'] in ('P', 'c'):
        print(f"  id={n['id']} color={n['color']} pixels={n['pixels']}")

ascii_lines = current_frame.ascii.split('\n')
print(f"\nTop row: {ascii_lines[0]}")

# Let me also check the full history to understand the pattern
print("\n--- History summary ---")
for h in history:
    s = h.frame.segmentation
    p_pixels = sum(n['pixels'] for n in s['nodes'] if n['color'] == 'P')
    c_pixels = sum(n['pixels'] for n in s['nodes'] if n['color'] == 'c')
    print(f"  Step {h.frame.step}: P={p_pixels}, c={c_pixels}, action={h.action}")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
